title: High-fidelity hydrophilic probe for two-photon fluorescence lysosomal imaging.
author: Wang X Nguyen DM Yanez CO Rodriguez L Ahn HY Bondar MV Belfield KD
content: S-EPMC2931774 PMC2931774 High-fidelity hydrophilic probe for two-photon fluorescence lysosomal imaging. The synthesis and characterization of a novel two-photon-absorbing fluorene derivative, LT1, selective for the lysosomes of HCT 116 cancer cells, is reported. Linear and nonlinear photophysical
